programme.title: Bad Taste

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Lauro nears the end of the Iditarod, crossing 260 miles of ice along the Bering Sea coast to reach the finish line in Nome; Marty and his friend Dave haul supplies for a cabin into the backcountry.

programme.title: Beat The Unbeaten: Off The Hook
programme.desc: Two previous champions will face off in a gruelling five-hour challenge, making a blade inspired by Hollywood for the chance to duke it out against one of our titans of the forge.

programme.title: Come Hell Or Low Water
programme.desc: A drought and sweltering temperatures drop water levels to their lowest point in decades, and access to the best honey holes in the swamp are nearly impassable. Hunters take huge risks to fill tags.

programme.title: Graves Concerns
programme.desc: As the Fellowship uncovers more of the mysterious structure in the swamp, artefacts within it suggest it could be a vault with a compelling history.

programme.title: The Sunken Legend
programme.desc: A powerful hurricane forces Jeff's team into a secluded cove, where they investigate The Lombrac, a legendary 18th-century ghost ship. The divers recover intriguing clues from the murky depths.

programme.title: Tummy Talk
programme.desc: When Sarah forgets her sandwich, her rumbling tummy inadvertently starts a conversation with a Frog.

programme.title: Moon's Exhibition
programme.desc: A trip to the art gallery unexpectedly helps Duck with the hunt for his lost toy Rhino.

programme.title: Detective
programme.desc: Myrtle calls Stanley to help solve the mystery of the Phantom Knitter. Overhearing this, Fifi jumps at the chance to help forming a dynamic, detective duo!

programme.title: First Aid
programme.desc: Myrtle calls Stanley to see if she can practice her first aid skills on him, but he's all fit and healthy. Instead, they go about the town making good use of Myrtle's newfound abilities.

programme.title: No Kissing In School
programme.desc: From feeling nervous and shy, to making a million friends! The funny animals chat about all the things they love about school.

programme.title: It's time to go to the hairdressers
programme.desc: JoJo learns how fun the hairdresser's can be when she goes with Gran Gran for a trim. After helping the hairdresser, JoJo also gets her own new style ready for Ezra's party!

programme.title: Sheep Dog
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Housework
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Pass the Parcel
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: The Opposites Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels have fun learning what opposites are, with help from their animal friends!

programme.title: The Radio Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels decide to start their own radio show.

programme.title: Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: Climate Change, The Arctic Ocean
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are watching for polar bears, but an iceberg is heading for their ship!

programme.title: Garlic
programme.desc: Fitness guru, Garlic, has a set of fun exercises to make you stronger.

programme.title: Avocado
programme.desc: The fabulous Avocados sing an operatic piece in their three unique voices.

programme.title: Walkie Talkie
programme.desc: The veggies are playing walkie-talkie hide-and-seek, but Evil Pea steals Carrot's walkie-talkie and uses it to trick the Veggies into getting trapped by the Corn Cobs.

programme.title: Evil Pea's Party Plan
programme.desc: It's Evil Pea's birthday, but she and Carrot are trapped in the bottom of her freezer. They must put their differences aside and work together to escape.

programme.title: The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: The Shopping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: The World Record
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. "If only we had more Duggee's" muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: Campfire Choir
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Running Around in Circles
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po run around in circles in Home Dome. The Noo-Noo joins in and the Teletubbies have fun chasing.

programme.title: Explorer
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing as they go exploring.

programme.title: Musical Statues
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: Stories
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Puppets
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Turtle Boy
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: Onesies
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: Crowning Around
programme.desc: Rajiv feels devastated when he loses his crown, thinking that it's the reason he is good at anything, but he soon learns that can still be really useful.

programme.title: Gordon Gets the Giggles
programme.desc: Gordon becomes very worried when he gets a serious case of the giggles. He must find a way to control his laughter before it does any damage.

programme.title: The Other Big Engine
programme.desc: While working on the Brazilian Railway, Thomas Meets Gustavo, another big blue engine who reminds him of Gordon back home.

programme.title: Timgad Ruins, Algeria
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit Timgad in Algeria, but someone is playing games with their click-ons.

programme.title: Everglades National Park, Florida
programme.desc: The Go Jetters save the Florida Everglades when hungry alligators chase Glitch's picnic.

programme.title: The Sphinx, Egypt
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots are on holiday in Egypt where the Grimbots bury the Great Sphinx in sand, leaving only its head showing.

programme.title: UFO
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo only wanted to help fix a satellite dish with Mojo's chopper top. Now they've been mistaken for a UFO, and the whole town is in a tizzy about invading aliens!

programme.title: Ice Scream
programme.desc: Betty the ice cream van is so full of ice cream that it's making her speed around town out of control. It's up to Mojo and Bo with the racer top to stop her and save those treats!

programme.title: Teething Problems
programme.desc: Evil Pea is annoyed by Supertato's winning smile, so she takes all the toothpaste in the supermarket to make sure it disappears forever.

programme.title: The Amazing Jalapeno
programme.desc: Chilli is excited to see Jalapeno attempt a tart-jumping record. But when Evil Pea ruins the attempt in order to steal the record, Supertato and Captain Chilli must save the day!

programme.title: 一步一脚印 发现新台湾
programme.desc: 台湾到处有充满创意、认真工作的人们，「一步一脚印，发现新台湾」将呈现出真实而全面的新台湾精神。

programme.title: 国民大会
programme.desc: 「国民大会」从台湾的人、台湾的事，畅谈台湾的故事，以深入浅出，轻松幽默的不同面向解读社会时事的氛围。

programme.title: 拜托ATM
programme.desc: 极具未来感场景的全新益智综艺节目《拜托ATM》，结合电玩游戏概念，挑战者将透过益智竞争，开启ATM进行终极译码游戏。一场科技与智慧的益智竞赛《拜托ATM》由行长胡瓜、襄理Sandra与精英挑战者携手打造。

programme.title: FOCUS全球新闻
programme.desc: 聚焦全球大事，从华府到北京，从欧美到亚非，从政治、经济到科技与文化，透过深度而完整的报导，带领观众进入关键事件的核心，补给面向世界的知识能量，掌握国际发展趋势。

programme.title: 地球黄金线
programme.desc: 「地球黄金线」首创专业汽车实境秀，提共最实用的市售车评比、最深入的汽车经典赏析、最夯的车坛趋势，解析汽车科新风貌。

programme.title: 食尚玩家
programme.desc: 美食旅游节目「食尚玩家」带你走遍台湾与世界各地，寻找在地美食，体验最道地的旅游行程。

programme.title: 健康2.0
programme.desc: 您对自己的身体了解多少？怎么样吃才能吃出健康和美丽？网络上的健康秘方到底是真是假？主持人郑凯云、江坤俊医师与韦汝将为您的健康把关！

programme.title: 11点热吵店
programme.desc: 《11点热吵店》透过年轻世代的角度，无论是两性、职场、人际、时事娱乐等，大谈他们最关心、最想发泄、最有意见的热门话题！

programme.title: 女人我最大

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: Americas Now
programme.desc: Americas Now profiles the development, diversity and challenges facing the Americas, particularly Latin America. The strength of the program is its storytelling. Correspondents across the region present insightful, well-researched and engaging narratives. Americas Now is a compelling, authoritative and balanced voice from the region, giving CGTN a competitive edge in the North American media market.

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: The Heat is a daily talk show anchored from Washington, D.C. It focuses on top stories making news globally. Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.title: City Siblings

programme.title: Oceanside In New Zealand

programme.title: Of Wreck And Ruin
programme.desc: An owner-listed property in La Puente is in rough shape, and as the property is tenant occupied, Tarek and Christina cannot assess the inside.

programme.desc: A 1930s bungalow in Long Beach, California is renovated and modernized.

programme.title: Too Good To Be True
programme.desc: After finding a clean house in good shape, Tarek and Christina rush to snatch up a simple cosmetic flip.

programme.title: Checking In To Hotel 1928

programme.title: Laughing At Loved Ones
programme.desc: If you can't laugh at the ones you love, who can you laugh at? A sense of humor and not taking yourself too seriously are important in a relationship.

programme.title: Family Fails

programme.title: An Ugly Glowup

programme.title: Bloomberg BusinessWeek
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the world of business and finance by harnessing the power of Bloomberg Businessweek reporters and editors.

programme.title: How Chinese Brands Are Going Global
programme.desc: From Pop Mart's Labubus to Shein, Temu and Luckin, Chinese brands have become global consumer favorites and cultural ambassadors. With much of the credit going to TikTok, shoppers are hungry for more.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: The Hospitals That Won't Let Patients Go Home
programme.desc: The International Finance Corp., an arm of the World Bank, spends millions of dollars of taxpayer money to build up private-sector services in the developing world.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With the West
programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: The Trading Guru and His Money-Losing Disciples
programme.desc: IM Academy was a global phenomenon, claiming it could make anyone a top trader. Its founder, Chris Terry, a self-made trader turned multimillionaire who flaunted luxury cars, private jets and apartments across continents.

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
programme.desc: In one of the most earthquake-prone regions on Earth, where the Tibetan Plateau meets the Himalayas, China is building a colossal hydropower system, pushing engineering and geopolitics to the limit.

programme.title: Who Will Fill Jamie Dimon's Shoes?
programme.desc: With a $4.6 trillion balance sheet, JPMorgan is more valuable than its three biggest rivals combined. And much of the bank’s success is arguably due to its long-time leader, Jamie Dimon.

programme.title: The Rise of America's ICE Towns
programme.desc: Small towns are at the center of President Donald Trump's mass deportation campaign, spearheaded by ICE. In one rural New Mexico county, officials are grappling with what it means to be an ICE town.

programme.title: Water
programme.desc: Water. Our survival depends on water, yet global reserves are rapidly shrinking. Can technology help secure humanity's future water needs?

programme.title: Pain
programme.desc: For some, pain is excruciating and inescapable. But amid the continuing fallout of the opioid crisis, new technologies are being developed to limit and even eliminate pain.

programme.title: Next Billion
programme.desc: Soon, another billion people will be online. How will these new users embrace this technology to transform their lives, and what will it mean for the rest of the world?

programme.title: Alexander Stubb, President of Finland
programme.desc: Francine visits Finland, where the threat from Russia looms large. She speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future.

programme.title: Ray Dalio, Founder of Bridgewater Associates
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.

programme.title: How to Run Your Family's $1.6 Trillion Empire
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.

programme.title: Theresa May and the Brutality of Politics
programme.desc: Former UK Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin, and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in "strongmen."

programme.title: Inside Europe's Economic Crises With Christine Lagarde
programme.desc: Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Ajay Banga on India, Migration and a Youth Jobs Time Bomb
programme.desc: What drives the world’s most influential minds? In Leaders with Francine Lacqua, we sit down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: How New Magnets Could Power the Future
programme.desc: Scientists are developing powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion. But China's dominance of the supply chain for rare-earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Can Living Human Brain Cells Power AI?
programme.desc: We explore the world of biocomputing-where scientists are laying the foundation for a field that may blur the lines between the biological and synthetic.

programme.title: The Big Business of Drilling Deep Into the Earth
programme.desc: Geothermal has been the underdog of the energy industry - but that may be about to change as new startups use fracking technologies to expand potential geothermal sites.

programme.title: Why Money Is Flowing Into Geoengineering
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilisation - and finding funding for it.

programme.title: How Flying Cars Became a Billion-Dollar Bet
programme.desc: Flying cars have largely remained science fiction, until now. A new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Why a Lunar Ecosystem Could Be Worth Billions
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Newsoms, California's First Couple
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets California’s First Couple, Governor Gavin Newsom and Jennifer Siebel Newsom, visiting their home in Marin County and offices in Sacramento to see how they work together.

programme.title: How Emmanuel Acho Reinvents Himself
programme.desc: The hosts talk with Emmanuel Acho about his reinvention from NFL linebacker to media leader, his show "Uncomfortable Conversations" and his new effort, "Speakeasy."

programme.title: The CEO Behind Barstool Sports & Food52
programme.desc: Erika Ayers Badan, former chief executive of Barstool Sports and current CEO of Food52, discusses navigating turnarounds and how setbacks can fuel growth.

programme.title: How Jerry Jones Built a Cowboys Empire
programme.desc: How Jerry Jones Built a Cowboys Empire. Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones speaks on risk-taking, making bold trades and the Main Street philosophy that fuelled his rise with the Cowboys.

programme.title: Principles With Bill Belichick and Ray Dalio
programme.desc: The hosts sit for a special conversation with two titans, football coach Bill Belichick and Bridgewater founder Ray Dalio, to learn their guiding principles for success.

programme.title: The Deadly Quest for Gold in South Africa
programme.desc: Gold built South Africa, but mining kills some who dig for it. In Stilfontein, a disaster that trapped miners underground reveals how a quest for gold became a story of hunger, survival and death.

programme.title: The Scandal That Rocked the Philippines
programme.desc: A police raid in a small town in the Philippines revealed a young mayor's alleged connections to a $2 billion Singapore money laundering scandal and Chinese espionage.

programme.title: Corruption as Cancer
programme.desc: The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission is supposed to root out graft. Instead, some of its members have been accused of perpetuating the very wrongdoing they were meant to stop.

programme.title: The Making of a Chinese Spy
programme.desc: Ji Chaoqun was a promising young engineer from Beijing heading to the US to study. Then China’s spy agency came calling with bags of cash, the promise of glory and an offer that would change his life forever.

programme.title: The Secret Kingpin Behind Iran's Oil Empire
programme.desc: Bloomberg Investigates takes viewers on an immersive journey to the heart of our most powerful reporting. Each investigation is recounted by award-winning journalists.

programme.title: How to Spot a Russian Deepfake
programme.desc: The award-winning series that sets out to uncover the truth behind some of the most powerful stories from around the world.

programme.title: North Korea's Hidden Remote IT Scheme
programme.desc: This is the story of how an Arizona woman's house became a gateway for North Korea's IT operatives - an underground "laptop farm" that infiltrated US companies and pumped millions to the regime.

programme.title: Murder on Rainbow Mountain
programme.desc: Rainbow Mountain offers tourists a picture-perfect view that has flooded social media feeds. But behind this viral beauty spot is the story of a community at war and cries for help ignored.

programme.title: Inside A UK Care Visa Scam
programme.desc: Alleged scammers in the UK are accused of defrauding would-be migrant healthcare workers out of tens of thousands of pounds. Some victims have turned to a vigilante "scammer hunter" for help.

programme.title: Week in the Life of an F1 Driver
programme.desc: Jason Kelly follows Pierre Gasly from Alpine Headquarters to a Paris photo shoot to get a firsthand look at how the business of being an F1 driver goes far beyond the track.

programme.title: The Future of Ferrari
programme.desc: Jason Kelly heads to Maranello, Italy, to speak with Ferrari's leadership about the coming regulatory changes for Formula 1 and how Ferrari's racing technology informs the road cars of today.

programme.title: Inside the Miami Grand Prix
programme.desc: Miami Grand Prix Managing Partner Tom Garfinkel tackles the complexities of putting on the race, and F1 CEO Stefano Domenicali reveals why it's key to F1's future growth.

programme.desc: Williams Team Principal James Vowles and F1 Academy drivers' champion Abbi Pulling show how advanced simulation is shaping the future of Formula 1.

programme.desc: Major League Baseball Hall of Famer Cal Ripken Jr. and his brother Bill have turned youth sports into big business. But can they chase profits while preserving what's best for kids?

programme.desc: Toronto Raptors President Masai Ujiri leads the only non-US team in the National Basketball Association, and he's spearheading an effort to take the game global.

programme.title: Love in the Age of Machines
programme.desc: Can we have real intimacy with machines? Emily Chang explores the future of such connections and the technologies powering a growing market of relationships-on-demand.

programme.title: Your Brain Is the Next Tech Frontier

programme.title: How Tech Is Breaking the Rules of Biology
programme.desc: From birth to death, tech is stretching the boundaries of biology. In this episode of Posthuman, we explore the discoveries that could transform reproduction, healthcare and how we die.

programme.title: 搜神传
programme.desc: 活泼开朗的蓟彩芝(钟嘉欣)从仙草化身的母亲身上得到仙气，变成半仙之体。石敢当(陈浩民)年幼时常被其他小童欺负，后得黄大仙怜悯，赐予九牛二虎之力。晏喜(陈锦鸿)的先祖受了懒虫诅咒，经常无故入睡。一次，喜意外被干将(欧锦棠)神灵附在身上，从此用剑如神。_x000D__x000D_芝、当、喜叁位好友，各自拥有上天赐予的神力，誓要合力消灭危害苍生的无极天尊(谭小环)，最终他们能否取得成功？

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 亲亲我好妈
programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 搜神传
programme.desc: 活泼开朗的蓟彩芝(钟嘉欣)从仙草化身的母亲身上得到仙气，变成半仙之体。石敢当(陈浩民)年幼时常被其他小童欺负，后得黄大仙怜悯，赐予九牛二虎之力。晏喜(陈锦鸿)的先祖受了懒虫诅咒，经常无故入睡。一次，喜意外被干将(欧锦棠)神灵附在身上，从此用剑如神。_x000D__x000D_芝、当、喜叁位好友，各自拥有上天赐予的神力，誓要合力消灭危害苍生的无极天尊(谭小环)，最终他们能否取得成功？

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 亲亲我好妈
programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 地狱天使
programme.desc: 年轻貌美的儿（张可颐），牵涉毒杀富翁及争夺遗产，找来石（陈启泰）当其辩护律师。儿的背景神秘复杂，且于有意无意间对石作出挑逗，令石留下深刻印象。_x000D__x000D_原来儿为石妻珊（苏玉华）之同父异母姐妹。儿因痛恨珊母当年抢走其父，致儿母沦为妓女，儿更惨遭嫖客强奸。儿誓要向珊母女二人进行报复。儿接近石，是为要珊婚姻决裂，家破人亡。_x000D__x000D_在儿的精心布局下，石渐转投其怀抱。儿见目标已达，欲抽身离去，却惊觉自己爱上了石。此时，儿情人关（何英伟）利用儿陷害石作其替死鬼，以掩饰其商业罪行……

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 地狱天使
programme.desc: 年轻貌美的儿（张可颐），牵涉毒杀富翁及争夺遗产，找来石（陈启泰）当其辩护律师。儿的背景神秘复杂，且于有意无意间对石作出挑逗，令石留下深刻印象。_x000D__x000D_原来儿为石妻珊（苏玉华）之同父异母姐妹。儿因痛恨珊母当年抢走其父，致儿母沦为妓女，儿更惨遭嫖客强奸。儿誓要向珊母女二人进行报复。儿接近石，是为要珊婚姻决裂，家破人亡。_x000D__x000D_在儿的精心布局下，石渐转投其怀抱。儿见目标已达，欲抽身离去，却惊觉自己爱上了石。此时，儿情人关（何英伟）利用儿陷害石作其替死鬼，以掩饰其商业罪行……

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: KOPI & SUSU AJA BERSATU, AKU & KAMU KAPAN?
programme.desc: Audi moves from her village to Jakarta to work at her uncle's coffee shop. She soon finds herself caught in a complicated love triangle between Rangga, the wealthy son of the shop owner, and Fero, a hardworking fellow employee.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Pesona 34-ku Bakalan Badabest Meluluhkan Hatimu
programme.desc: A reckless Surya (Bastian Steel) nearly crashes his car into the motorcycle driven by Citra (Sitha Marino). Citra is furious, leading to a fierce roadside argument with the speeding, hot headed Surya.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: IM ADDICTED TO NENG NASI UDUK CANS
programme.desc: After a rebellious escape from his restrictive life, Gibran crosses paths with Suci, a humble girl who sells nasi uduk. Determined to change his ways, Gibran sets out on a mission to win her heart and prove he is her dream match.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: POV Disekop-Sekop Cogan 34M Followers
programme.desc: During a chaotic fight, Echa (Zoe Abbas Jackson) and El (Cinta Brian) accidentally knock Tristan (Kevin Hillers) unconscious. Panicking and thinking he’s dead, they plan to hide the 'body' to avoid jail. But just as they are about to dump him, Tristan wakes up! Instead of being angry, Tristan who was bored with his daily routine is thrilled by the adventure and asks them to take him on a vacation.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: I LEFT MY LOVE IN KEBUN JERUK
programme.desc: Sita went to Bali to visit her uncle, Pak Yusak, an orange collector known for buying crops at very low prices. Together with his son, Herdi, Pak Yusak had long dominated the orange trade in the area. Dewan, an orange farmer, fought for a price increase for the sake of fairness for the farmers, but his efforts were always rejected. At first, Sita was unaware of the conflict, but after learning about it, she chose to support Dewan. Sita's stance angered Herdi, who kicked her out.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Cosplay Deket Kamu Cintanya No Play Play
programme.desc: Rana (Aylena Fusil) works as a roadside ghost cosplayer to pay off her brother's debts. When she tries to help a lost child who happens to be Erza’s (El Ryan Carlen) nephew Erza arrives and mistakenly accuses the 'ghost' of trying to kidnap the boy.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU

programme.desc: Foreigners, leaving their homelands behind, have come all the way to a new country, South Korea, for reasons such as work, study or even marriage. The real stories of foreigners who challenge themselves to survive in Korean society are unfolded!

programme.title: KRAZY RICH KOREAN
programme.desc: Just how crazy do you have to be to conquer the world? Step inside the lives of the pioneers behind the Korean Wave, and discover what it really takes to achieve world-class success.

programme.title: Boss in the Mirror
programme.desc: Korean celebrity-bosses go through self-examination to create a better working environment for their employees.

programme.title: Immortal Songs 2
programme.desc: The true classics of the century are born again! Classic songs are reinterpreted by the best idol groups in Korea! Don't miss this beautiful competition with heart-moving moments that transcend generations!

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In the rapidly developing town of Onjeong, two rival medical families - one modern and one traditional - wage a neighbourhood feud fuelled by a long-standing grudge. This drama follows their chaotic journey as they unravel decades of misunderstanding to find healing and love.

programme.title: Dear.M
programme.desc: A pure, no-filter youth romance drama unravelling a pink-hued mystery as the search goes on for 'M', the protagonist behind the love letter that turned Seoyeon University upside down.

programme.title: My Neighbor, Charles
programme.desc: Foreigners, leaving their homelands behind, have come all the way to a new country, South Korea, for reasons such as work, study or even marriage. The real stories of foreigners who challenge themselves to survive in Korean society are unfolded!

programme.title: The European debrief
programme.desc: Live headlines,breaking news, analysis and interviews from Europe's News Centre.

programme.title: The European debrief
programme.desc: Live headlines,breaking news, analysis and interviews from Europe's News Centre.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: The leading news stories of the moment.

programme.title: Watchmen: Chapter I
programme.desc: In an alternate world history set in 1985, the murder of a government sponsored superhero draws his outlawed colleagues out of retirement and into a mystery that threatens to upend their personal lives and the world itself.

programme.title: PU-239
programme.desc: A worker at a Russian nuclear plant steals a small amount of weapons grade plutonium and tries to sell it on the Moscow black market.

programme.title: Rocket Science
programme.desc: A wry comedy of adolescent angst and confusion, this HBO Original Movie traces a teenager's journey of tackling the mysteries of life, love and public speaking.

programme.title: The Love Guru
programme.desc: An enlightened American spiritual leader is tasked to help a professional athlete overcome his failed romance while he falls for the team's manager instead.

programme.title: Batman V Superman: Dawn Of Justice
programme.desc: Amidst the war between Batman and Superman, a new threat arises, putting mankind in an unimaginably great danger.

programme.title: Sphere
programme.desc: Dustin Hoffman, Sharon Stone and Samuel L. Jackson star as researchers sent to unearth the mystery of a 300-year-old spaceship buried 1000 feet under the sea.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: When a young African-American man visits his white girlfriend's family estate, he becomes ensnared in the more sinister, real reason for the invitation.

programme.title: Hollywood On Set S1
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: The Late Shift
programme.desc: When the undisputed "King of Late Night" announced his retirement, the stage is set to find a replacement host of the successful "The Tonight Show".

programme.title: Indictment: The Mcmartin Trial
programme.desc: A fact-based drama based on the longest and most expensive trial in American history that ended without a single conviction.

programme.title: The Truman Show
programme.desc: Truman Burbank is the star of his own TV show and the town he has lived in all his life is really a soundstage! Stars Jim Carrey.

programme.title: Warcraft
programme.desc: The peaceful realm of Azeroth stands on the brink of war as its civilisation faces a fearsome race of invaders.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: A shy, small-town boy becomes one of the most iconic figures in rock & roll we all know as Elton John.

programme.title: Lego Jurassic Park: The Unofficial Retelling
programme.desc: The ever charming and now slightly older Chaos Mathematician Dr. Ian Malcolm retells the tale of what happened that dreadful night at Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Hotel For Dogs
programme.desc: A teen secretly fills a vacant house with stray dogs after she moves in with her fastidious aunt and has to leave her dog behind.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles, and Tails are back for their most epic adventure yet. The team reunite to face a new formidable foe, Shadow.

programme.title: Blood Diamond
programme.desc: A smuggler, fisherman and reporter team up in search of a priceless pink diamond, a lost son and the dark story behind the diamond trade.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po’s new life as The Dragon Warrior is threatened by the emergence of a formidable villain determined to conquer China and destroy Kung Fu.

programme.title: Splitsville
programme.desc: Carey seeks support after divorce, but learns Julie and Paul's secret: an open marriage. Crossing the line throws all their lives into turmoil.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: A young man discovers the meaning of true love while battling princes, ghosts and an evil witch in a quest to protect the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Arcadian
programme.desc: Paul and his twin teenage sons, Thomas and Joseph, have been living a half-life - tranquility by day and torment by night.

programme.title: The Astronaut
programme.desc: After returning from her first space mission, astronaut Sam Walker fears that something extraterrestrial has followed her back to Earth.

programme.title: Bugonia
programme.desc: Two conspiracy-obsessed young men kidnap the high-powered CEO of a major company, convinced that she is an alien intent on destroying planet Earth.

programme.title: London Calling
programme.desc: A down on his luck hitman is forced to babysit the teenage son of his new crime boss after fleeing the UK from a job gone wrong.

programme.title: Two Mules For Sister Sara
programme.desc: When a former Civil War soldier saves a nun from a gang of bandits, they team up to help the Mexicans in their war against the French.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Po is a dreamer who must embrace his true self in order to become the Dragon Warrior. Filled with high-kicking humor and an all-star cast.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol agent (Owen) attempts to expose a high-profile financial institution's role in an international arms dealing ring.

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: Jim Carrey and Cameron Diaz star in this story of a sweet, socially inept bank teller who discovers a mask that transforms him into a superhero ... but one whom you may not want to call for help.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Po is a dreamer who must embrace his true self in order to become the Dragon Warrior. Filled with high-kicking humor and an all-star cast.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol agent (Owen) attempts to expose a high-profile financial institution's role in an international arms dealing ring.

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: Jim Carrey and Cameron Diaz star in this story of a sweet, socially inept bank teller who discovers a mask that transforms him into a superhero ... but one whom you may not want to call for help.

programme.title: Fargo (1996)
programme.desc: Minnesota car salesman Jerry Lundegaard's inept crime falls apart due to his and his henchmen's bungling and the persistent police work of the quite pregnant Marge Gunderson.

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: A virtuous Hong Kong Police Officer must clear his good name when the drug lord he is after frames him for the murder of a dirty cop.

programme.title: V For Vendetta
programme.desc: In a future Britain turned fascist, a masked vigilante known as "V" fights to free the nation. Teaming up with a young woman he rescues, they ignite a revolution against tyranny.

programme.title: Out Of Time
programme.desc: A Florida police chief must solve a vicious double homicide before he himself falls under suspicion.

programme.title: Jabariya Jodi
programme.desc: Abhay kidnaps greedy grooms who demand dowry and forces them into reform, but when his childhood love Babli returns, his mission and heart begin to change. Release Year: 2019 Director: Prashant Singh

programme.title: Happy Bhag Jayegi
programme.desc: Happy, a vibrant Indian girl, elopes on the day of her wedding so that she can marry Guddu, the man of her dreams. Confusion ensues when she mistakenly arrives at the home of a Pak. Release Year: 2016 Director: MudaSSar Aziz Awards: 7 nominations

programme.title: Aatma Feel it Around You
programme.desc: The story revolves around a single mother, who fights against the vengeful spirit of her deceased husband in order to protect her daughter.

programme.title: Love, Sitara
programme.desc: Sitara, who avoided marriage all her life, suddenly proposes to Arjun, shocking her family in Kerala and uncovering secrets that change everything they believed. Release Year: 2024 Director: Vandana Kataria

programme.title: Pardes
programme.desc: Kishorilal plans his NRI son's wedding to Ganga, but her bond with foster son Arjun sparks conflict, forcing the family to face love over tradition. Release Year: 1997 Director: Subhash Ghai Awards: 1998 Winner Filmfare Award- Best Playback Singer- Female- Alka Yagnik, 1998 Winner Filmfare Award- Best Debut ActreSS- Mahima Chaudhry, 1998 Winner Filmfare Award- Best Screenplay- Subhash Ghai

programme.title: Dream Girl
programme.desc: Karamveer gains fame by posing as a woman on a call centre job, but obsessive callers turn his secret into chaos, dragging him into trouble that threatens his real identity. Release Year: 2019 Director: Raaj Shaandilyaa

programme.title: Joggers Park
programme.desc: An elderly widower forms an unlikely bond with a young woman in a park, leading to a controversial relationship that challenges societal norms and personal emotions. Release Year: 2003 Director: Anant Balani

programme.title: Valimai
programme.desc: A ruthless bike gang terrorizes the city and shatters order, until fearless cop Arjun rises against crime, risking his life to restore justice and bring back peace.

programme.title: Meow Am Legend
programme.desc: As the Wendelstein residents fall helplessly, Grandma attempts to save the day through an interspecies cat meeting.

programme.title: An Unfamiliar Forest
programme.desc: Kenichi is sent to a different world, where he realises he can use an online shopping website as a skill and stay alive.

programme.title: Curry Is Justice!
programme.desc: Primura shows up in front of Kenichi and asks him to meet her father, who is the director of a big trading company.

programme.title: Summer Will Be Here Soon
programme.desc: After leaving the house without saying goodbye to Kyo, Kazuma confesses that he took Kyo in to atone for his past.

programme.title: Hello Again
programme.desc: The 'Prince Yuki' fan club tries to find out the new members of the student council to know if there are any other girls.

programme.title: The 1st Rank Court Pharmacist And Reborn Pharmacy Researcher
programme.desc: Bruno takes Falma to the Palace. There he sees the Queen, Elilzabeth II, lying on the bed. She is sick.

programme.title: Her Majesty The Queen And The Royal Establishment
programme.desc: Pharma saves the Queen's life and is rewarded a pharmacy that he wishes for, where he can save all lives.

programme.title: The Everyday Life Of Parallel World Pharmacy And Cosmetics
programme.desc: The Pharmacy's attracting citizens' attention, but there aren't many customers. Lotte conducts a survey to find out why.

programme.title: The Siblings And The Sea
programme.desc: After Falma has returned from port of Marseirre, the number of customers triples and there is a strange duo.

programme.title: The Boy With No Shadow And The Inquisitor
programme.desc: The true identity of the white-clad group is the inquisitor. Falma is seen as an evil spirit and attacked.

programme.title: The Royal Knights’ Academy
programme.desc: Inglis and Rafinha visit Ahlemin. Suddenly, Magicite beasts attack the city. While they are fighting, they meet Leone.

programme.title: The Labyrinth Of Ordeals

programme.title: The expedition

programme.title: The sacred mask
programme.desc: Fara and Koto are two children born with disabilities. Seeing this as a curse, their parents plan to bury them alive to ward it off. Thanks to the kindness of their brothers and sisters, they narrowly escape and embark on a fantastic adventure.

programme.title: Lawyer
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: Ski goggles
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: The activity calendar
programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.title: See you at 5 etoiles
programme.desc: The world is undergoing a brutal change: technology is breaking down and all sources of energy are disappearing. All except Tes and Oskar's heads, whose hair starts to generate electricity! Using this power, they set out to find their missing mother.

programme.title: The new Eden
programme.desc: The world is undergoing a brutal change: technology is breaking down and all sources of energy are disappearing. All except Tes and Oskar's heads, whose hair starts to generate electricity! Using this power, they set out to find their missing mother.

programme.title: Mummy's Magic Cream
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Architect blues
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: Veiled chameleon
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: The drought
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: etienne Moyat - A Thousand and One Reliefs
programme.desc: Etienne Moyat's creations reflect his deep respect and love for nature. A trained cabinetmaker, he produces unique, monumental pieces for high-end projects. Alongside this, he pursues an intense and instinctive painting practice.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Sikou Niakate (Mali)
programme.desc: After growing up in a squat near Paris and then in a working-class neighborhood in the 19th arrondissement, Sikou became an author and director. His work explores the fractures of identity, social class, gender and racism. Through cinema and writing, he gives a voice to those condemned to silence.

programme.title: Malia Metella
programme.desc: She's a big name in French swimming! Olympic silver medalist in Athens in 2004, multiple European and World medalist, she was for years the face of French sprinting in the pool: Malia Metella is Pierre Classen's guest.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Diadie Dombana (Paris) / Hugues Mbenda (Marseille)
programme.desc: In the Chateau-Rouge district of Paris, Richard Orlinski meets Diadie Diombana, a self-taught chef of Malian origin, who embodies a mixed cuisine blending West African, Japanese and Latin American influences. With him, the market becomes a true laboratory of inspiration, where each ingredient is a bridge between cultures. In Marseille, Hugues Mbanda, a chef originally from Kinshasa, has a journey marked by exile and a passion for French gastronomy.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Justin Fisch, naturalist and guide in Florida
programme.desc: He figures amongst the thirty Canadians aged under 30 considered the most influential in terms of sustainable development. Justin Fisch welcomes a group for a trip by canoe-kayak through the Everglades: a forty-kilometre journey to explore the famous wetlands.

programme.desc: Discovering the treasures of the French regions, the initiatives and people who bring them to life.

programme.title: Basik
programme.desc: The programme which explores and explains the economy, examines our relationship to money and analyses our purchasing power. The economic, social and environmental challenges of tomorrow are covered in a direct, down-to-earth and occasionally mischievous manner!

programme.title: a Bon Entendeur
programme.desc: ''ABE'' examines a wide range of topics affecting everyday life in everyday homes: it tests products, compares prices, highlights fraudulent practices, raises consumer awareness and questions manufacturers. The programme addresses economic, social, environmental and health issues and talks about leisure activities, technology...

programme.title: Le Grand Jt Des Territoires
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Vivement Dimanche
programme.desc: On his iconic red sofa, Michel Drucker welcomes and shines the spotlight on the talent of yesterday, today and tomorrow. A main guest talks about their career, their projects and their origins...

programme.title: echappees Belles
programme.desc: Sophie Jovillard, Jerome Pitorin, Ismael Khelifa and Tiga embark the traveller that lies within each of us for a fabulous breath of fresh air! Ninety minutes filled with new horizons and fascinating encounters around the world, four different ways of seeing a city, a region, a country...

programme.title: Sikou Niakate (Mali)
programme.desc: After growing up in a squat near Paris and then in a working-class neighborhood in the 19th arrondissement, Sikou became an author and director. His work explores the fractures of identity, social class, gender and racism. Through cinema and writing, he gives a voice to those condemned to silence.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: La Grande Galerie Francophone
programme.desc: Every week and in public, Ali Baddou and his group of columnists receive French-speaking artists who are at the heart of current events and move the lines. Space for exchanges, creations and surprises, ''La Grande Galerie Francophone'' celebrates art in all its diversity and shares it with everyone.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Un Dimanche a La Campagne
programme.desc: A weekend together, far from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. A moment out of time to get to know one another, talk of love, friendship, life. In a house open to surprises and the unexpected, between emotion and laughter, each reveals the invisible thread of their personal story...

programme.title: Top 14 Rugby Le Mag
programme.desc: Presenting the day's action in the Top 14, the French rugby championship, with summaries and highlights from the matches, players interviews and comments.

programme.title: #Investigation
programme.desc: Your rendezvous for current affairs and investigative journalism from the RTBF teams. Research, evidence, personal stories and confrontations are at the heart of the film reports about a range of subjects mainly relating to Belgian society. The key words? Independence and transparency!

programme.title: The Forbidden Kiss
programme.desc: When a crew member has to leave the boat, a secret kiss happens that sends the entire crew into a spiral. The crew visits an elite sailing team and attends a flamenco show where major epiphanies occur. A surprise visitor comes aboard that could change everything.

programme.title: The Poo-Petrator
programme.desc: A blast from the past has one of the crew members desperate to reignite an old flame. New crew configurations cause resentments to blossom. A guest leaves an unwelcome surprise in the shower, setting off a mystery within the interior.

programme.title: Guilt Trip
programme.desc: Two crew members contend with whether or not to feel guilty after committing a major betrayal. Romantic entanglements on the boat get messy. A crew member returns and is shocked to discover that everything has changed.

programme.title: Break- Ups And Shake-Ups
programme.desc: A betrayal is revealed and awkwardness and confrontations follow. While a crew member is running out of time to get a second chance, a major breakup changes everything. The deck team struggles to work in the swell, which causes a huge blow up between two deckhands.

programme.title: Stricken Nuggets
programme.desc: An argument over a jet ski causes a major rift in the deck team. A long-held bromance is threatened. A heart-to-heart about commitment is interrupted and tempers flare in multiple directions.

programme.title: Bubble Trouble
programme.desc: A group of loud, brash New Yorkers board the boat and put the crew back on their heels. Bad weather keeps the boat at the dock and a considerable emergency pops up. A crew member gets injured. A long-running friendship frays.

programme.title: Baby Steps
programme.desc: The charter season comes to an end and two crew members go all in on a bad decision. A returning visitor has a pleasant surprise. Some crew members get happy endings while others exchange harsh words. For a couple of crew members, the end is just the beginning.

programme.title: Raising the Bar-Celona
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and three trusted returnees are back for another wild charter season but when two deckies are sidelined by illness, the crew struggles to get the boat ready in time for charter. Aesha worries one of her green stews may be giving her deju vu. A crewmember damages the boat on the first night.

programme.title: Stingled Out
programme.desc: The deck team struggles to find their footing, and big mistakes are made. A stew begins to flirt with all male crewmembers on board. The chef struggles to get a handle on eccentric guest requests. Tension between two deckhands escalates to a heated argument.

programme.title: Excess Baggage
programme.desc: A group of wealthy socialites keep the crew busy. The stews vie for attention from the guys. Meanwhile, the deck team downfall continues as major mistakes cause chaos including a deckhand that floats out to sea on a jet ski.

programme.title: Tough Divisions
programme.desc: A group of young, entitled guests continue to cause chaos for the crew. The chef pulls together an over-the-top eight-course tasting menu that totally rocks and when the primary demands a late-night swim, it lands him and the crew in murky waters. Two deckhands have become a liability and Capt. Sandy and Nathan must figure out what to do about it.

programme.title: Let The Games Vegan
programme.desc: A massive changeover rocks the boat. A stew gets pulled in multiple and a flirty love triangle starts to heat up. The chef struggles to cater to vegan guests with particular palates and complaints.

programme.title: The Tempest
programme.desc: Bad weather rolls in suddenly and causes chaos. A crew member takes on a new role and shifts the group dynamic. Romance heats up on board, prompting jealousy and a crew member initiates a tearful breakup.

programme.title: Le Vie En Bros
programme.desc: A new crew member joins and whips the boat into shape. A bachelor charters the yacht along with his matchmaker in the hopes of finding love while at sea. A newly single crew member sends romantic possibilities spinning. The Chief Stew gives a sharp warning about a love triangle on board.

programme.title: French Kiss
programme.desc: The deck team comes under fire for being too lax on the job. The Primary gets in hot water with the women he’s dating. A promotion on the interior leaves a stew feeling envious. An unexpected hook-up sends shockwaves through the crew.

programme.title: This is Un-Peasant
programme.desc: A shocking hook-up divides the interior. During a day out at a beach club, sexual tension explodes in every direction. The charter guests insult the yacht crew. A deckhand puts a guest in a compromising situation.

programme.title: Bowing Out
programme.desc: The chef is tasked with preparing an unusual dish for dinner. The guests stay up late and cause damage around the boat during a night of fun during docking, sending the deck team into a panic. Some of the on-board romances heat up while others fizzle out.

programme.title: Crossing Lines
programme.desc: The Bosun makes a difficult choice that angers one of the deckhands. A romance that was getting serious starts to take a turn. A group of hot charter guests come aboard and one of the stews is smitten. Tensions on the deck team spill over and cause meltdowns.

programme.title: 前进战略高地
programme.desc: 以全球华人战略观点与思维製作的大国政治、经济与军武版图角力的深度解析节目；锁定全球最新的第一线军事动态、强权政治博弈与国际经济衝击，拆解大国角力背後的战略思维。

programme.title: cti talk网路论坛
programme.desc: 中天2024全新网路论坛《两岸永久和平 大师对话系列》，我们邀请最顶尖大师，探讨两岸永久和平的可能性，更剖析年轻人心中的集体焦虑。2024总统大选前所有人都该关心的题目，新政府，候选人，年轻世代，三方脑力激荡，欢迎一起来讨论，在未来恐更多变的两岸关系里，碰撞出一个更好的新未来。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】为应对明塱离职潮，永成主动支援。马来西亚医疗中心因投资者涉嫌洗黑钱被捕而功亏一篑，以珈在调查过程中，发现德桥早已知悉该投资者有问题，却对她有所隐瞒。明塱允许大部份已离职的医护回巢，但带头跳槽的英杰、建邦、宇泽等人遭一妍解雇；建邦主动向启澄求和……医疗城动土仪式举行后，天秤突然倒下，永成因此受重伤，急需换肾

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明坚持大开城门引出刺客，翼无忧和阿夙等人计划刺杀彧修明。在大婚之日，翼无忧冲进皇宫，与彧修明展开生死对决，但被彧修明打败身死。同时，樊如晦的叛乱也被平定，其最终自杀身亡。彧修明和叶凌霜成婚后共同执掌朝政，修建运河，发展经济，为百姓谋求福祉。最终，彧修明的儿子继承皇位，九州大陆迎来了统一与和谐。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 乐游原
programme.desc: 改编自同名小说，讲述了朝堂动荡皇权旁落，镇守边关的皇孙李嶷（徐凯饰）被迫承担起平叛重任，与隐藏真实身份的将军独女崔琳（景甜饰）各领一军卷入纷争。二人在数次交锋中相杀相爱。

programme.title: 乐游原
programme.desc: 改编自同名小说，讲述了朝堂动荡皇权旁落，镇守边关的皇孙李嶷（徐凯饰）被迫承担起平叛重任，与隐藏真实身份的将军独女崔琳（景甜饰）各领一军卷入纷争。二人在数次交锋中相杀相爱。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】德桥因与以珈的绯闻，受到AKL高层压力，不能在董事会上投票给一妍。杏芳向一妍提出交易，若一妍同意医院卖出病人的资料，可换得杏芳的选票，一妍未有答应。建邦被追债追到医院，向启澄表示只能求助永成。一妍借筱蕙获得AKL高层的黑材料，抢回德桥的一票。一妍万众瞩目的手术直播才刚开始，方欣就率领医务会代表现身，指一妍违反专业操守，要即时停职。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】方欣公开录音，证明一妍加入明塱只为报仇。一妍被暂停职务，方欣顺利登上主席之位。丽雪因录音怀疑一妍是飞机失事的主谋，以珈却有所保留。原来志明的出现，全都是方欣的计划。一妍看似无法反击，只能听候医务会发落……永成拉拢方欣，成功加盟医疗城项目。新加坡首富魏孝棠让孙儿入住明塱医院，其孙儿要做心脏手术。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】孝棠的孙儿接受心脏手术在即，成败关系到一妍的去留。然而，一妍的腕管综合症加剧，右手连拿餐具都没力。方欣试图阻止一妍的手术，但碍于病人已开刀，一妍拒绝，手痛却令一妍无法拿稳手术刀……以珈意外发现一妍的手腕病情属实，担心会影响海淳的手术，但一妍保证不会有问题！

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍接到以珈通知后赶回香港，应对方欣展开的挖角潮。一妍尝试加薪挽留不果，多达一百名医护辞职，当中还包括建邦。启澄对于被建邦背叛感震惊，二人闹翻。永成担心明塱一旦倒闭，自己的投资等于泡汤。秀琳决定改由以珈担任代主席。以珈偶然得知马来西亚医疗中心的主要投资人涉及商业诈骗，直觉是扭转局面的关键。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】为应对明塱离职潮，永成主动支援。马来西亚医疗中心因投资者涉嫌洗黑钱被捕而功亏一篑，以珈在调查过程中，发现德桥早已知悉该投资者有问题，却对她有所隐瞒。明塱允许大部份已离职的医护回巢，但带头跳槽的英杰、建邦、宇泽等人遭一妍解雇；建邦主动向启澄求和……医疗城动土仪式举行后，天秤突然倒下，永成因此受重伤，急需换肾

programme.title: 荣誉:她们的法庭
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】三位律师挚友在专为女性受害者辩护的律所中，面对20年前秘密重现。她们展现钢铁般的团结，直面过去阴影，守护正义与彼此。

programme.title: 法官大人
programme.desc: 判昊试图让浩英回忆起能证明他肇事逃逸的线索。相赫决心找到凶手，但康宪命令他返回美国。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 乐游原
programme.desc: 改编自同名小说，讲述了朝堂动荡皇权旁落，镇守边关的皇孙李嶷（徐凯饰）被迫承担起平叛重任，与隐藏真实身份的将军独女崔琳（景甜饰）各领一军卷入纷争。二人在数次交锋中相杀相爱。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 荣誉:她们的法庭
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】三位律师挚友在专为女性受害者辩护的律所中，面对20年前秘密重现。她们展现钢铁般的团结，直面过去阴影，守护正义与彼此。

programme.title: 法官大人
programme.desc: 康宪得知李相泽家发生了致命火灾后传讯相赫。判昊收到了来自未知号码的神秘短信。

programme.title: 洪拳大师
programme.desc: 广东十虎之首的铁桥三为人景仰，拥有徒弟无数。当时达官贵人都以吸食鸦片为时尚，而铁桥三亦随俗吸食，身子因此渐受毒害。后来，铁桥三更被烟馆主人击败，幸得徒弟舍身相救，他才不致丧命。于是，铁桥三决心戒掉鸦片，重新振作。

programme.title: 星际钝胎
programme.desc: 美丽但无知的李天珍被外星人捉上飞碟，事后无人相信她曾与外星人接触。于是，当她打算一死以示清白之际，却遇上同有轻生念头的失败私家侦探伊电。二人互吐心声后改变主意，却遭遇一连串奇遇，而二人的爱情故事也因此开始。

programme.title: 飞狐外传
programme.desc: 十八年前，胡斐之父胡一刀，与苗人凤交换刀剑比武，被己刀伤，继而身亡，原来胡之刀早被田归农涂上毒药；苗妻南兰被田勾引，竟抛夫弃女，后田更以毒粉弄瞎苗双眼；斐见苗受此遭遇，决定代其向药王求救，亦因此碰上一生中最爱的药王传人程灵素......

programme.title: 玉女嬉春
programme.desc: 吕紫英陪同父吕天奇到台湾发展，两姐白虹、青萍留港继续歌舞生涯。白虹认识江庆良后投契相恋，江向老板引荐白虹在歌剧中当主角，老父回来见三位女儿成就，开心不已。

programme.title: 童子功
programme.desc: 武功秘笈《童子功》原掌握在正义武林人士的手中，江湖异人龙无天盗去前三招，龙为实现称霸江湖的野心，决心要将那本武功秘笈的所有招式弄到手。他率领一群爪牙四处掠索，横行江湖。浪侠及甘素凡二位青年，抱着为师复仇、为民除害的决心，各自苦练武功，分别跟踪龙无天，历经数劫，师兄妹两人终于重逢相认，并肩作战.....

programme.title: 娃娃夫人
programme.desc: 三十五岁的男教师林明娶了十七岁的女学生珍珍。两人在同一学校上课，隐藏夫妻秘密。珍发觉林明常被女生包围，而林又发现珍常被男老师追求，期间笑料百出。

programme.title: 鸳鸯剑侠
programme.desc: 桂武与甘联珠夫妇二人是江湖上著名的「鸳鸯剑侠」。一天，二人不慎堕入红莲寺的绑架阴谋。当甘联珠不慎被擒时，桂武成功逃脱并找甘家协助，却不晓得自己会使甘氏陷入绑架者的伏击之中。最后桂武能否成功救出甘联珠？

programme.title: 千娇百媚
programme.desc: 有才华的女艺员兰兰与梅梅新加入「马氏歌舞团」，兰兰与团主马英不和。马英在报纸匿名征求女友，兰兰与他以匿名用书信往来，互生情愫。相约见面时，两人胆怯退缩。歌舞团获邀到日本表演，由马英带领，兰兰担任女主角，二人的关系可否趁机会发展？

programme.title: 新飞狐外传
programme.desc: 故事讲述了号称打遍天下无敌手的苗人凤，与大侠胡一刀不打不相识又识英雄重英雄，在比武过程中中了奸计，苗误杀了胡，胡妻亦为夫殉情。儿子胡斐长大后誓要报仇......斐先后邂逅袁紫衣，程灵素二女，发展一段无私的三角恋。

programme.title: 拜倒石榴裙
programme.desc: 丁芝华绮年玉貌，衣着华丽，将偷回来的珠宝从香港偷运去星加坡。因钻石不准进口，芝华情急智生，将戒指盒放进陌生男子张志贤衣袋，顺利通过，但当出机场时却不见志贤的踪迹。芝华找遍星加坡每一角落，都找不到志贤。一日，芝华到泳场，竟巧遇志贤，她便用尽一切方法去接近志贤欲取回戒指...

programme.title: 五虎将
programme.desc: 一帮土匪带着劫来的保险箱到某小镇，迫铁匠韦开箱，韦却逃走报官。匪帮滥杀村民，多名义士闻讯，联手对抗众匪。

programme.title: 人皮灯笼
programme.desc: 赵春方曾于决斗败于龙帅之手下。七年后，龙帅为在赏灯大会上夺魁，往寻赵春方代为制造别致灯笼。赵春方藉此暗中布下复仇大计。龙帅之妻无固失踪后，他惊闻有关人皮灯笼的传说，并开始怀疑赵春方与失踪事件有关......

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】为应对明塱离职潮，永成主动支援。马来西亚医疗中心因投资者涉嫌洗黑钱被捕而功亏一篑，以珈在调查过程中，发现德桥早已知悉该投资者有问题，却对她有所隐瞒。明塱允许大部份已离职的医护回巢，但带头跳槽的英杰、建邦、宇泽等人遭一妍解雇；建邦主动向启澄求和……医疗城动土仪式举行后，天秤突然倒下，永成因此受重伤，急需换肾

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明坚持大开城门引出刺客，翼无忧和阿夙等人计划刺杀彧修明。在大婚之日，翼无忧冲进皇宫，与彧修明展开生死对决，但被彧修明打败身死。同时，樊如晦的叛乱也被平定，其最终自杀身亡。彧修明和叶凌霜成婚后共同执掌朝政，修建运河，发展经济，为百姓谋求福祉。最终，彧修明的儿子继承皇位，九州大陆迎来了统一与和谐。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 乐游原
programme.desc: 改编自同名小说，讲述了朝堂动荡皇权旁落，镇守边关的皇孙李嶷（徐凯饰）被迫承担起平叛重任，与隐藏真实身份的将军独女崔琳（景甜饰）各领一军卷入纷争。二人在数次交锋中相杀相爱。

programme.title: 乐游原
programme.desc: 改编自同名小说，讲述了朝堂动荡皇权旁落，镇守边关的皇孙李嶷（徐凯饰）被迫承担起平叛重任，与隐藏真实身份的将军独女崔琳（景甜饰）各领一军卷入纷争。二人在数次交锋中相杀相爱。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】德桥因与以珈的绯闻，受到AKL高层压力，不能在董事会上投票给一妍。杏芳向一妍提出交易，若一妍同意医院卖出病人的资料，可换得杏芳的选票，一妍未有答应。建邦被追债追到医院，向启澄表示只能求助永成。一妍借筱蕙获得AKL高层的黑材料，抢回德桥的一票。一妍万众瞩目的手术直播才刚开始，方欣就率领医务会代表现身，指一妍违反专业操守，要即时停职。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】方欣公开录音，证明一妍加入明塱只为报仇。一妍被暂停职务，方欣顺利登上主席之位。丽雪因录音怀疑一妍是飞机失事的主谋，以珈却有所保留。原来志明的出现，全都是方欣的计划。一妍看似无法反击，只能听候医务会发落……永成拉拢方欣，成功加盟医疗城项目。新加坡首富魏孝棠让孙儿入住明塱医院，其孙儿要做心脏手术。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】孝棠的孙儿接受心脏手术在即，成败关系到一妍的去留。然而，一妍的腕管综合症加剧，右手连拿餐具都没力。方欣试图阻止一妍的手术，但碍于病人已开刀，一妍拒绝，手痛却令一妍无法拿稳手术刀……以珈意外发现一妍的手腕病情属实，担心会影响海淳的手术，但一妍保证不会有问题！

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍接到以珈通知后赶回香港，应对方欣展开的挖角潮。一妍尝试加薪挽留不果，多达一百名医护辞职，当中还包括建邦。启澄对于被建邦背叛感震惊，二人闹翻。永成担心明塱一旦倒闭，自己的投资等于泡汤。秀琳决定改由以珈担任代主席。以珈偶然得知马来西亚医疗中心的主要投资人涉及商业诈骗，直觉是扭转局面的关键。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】为应对明塱离职潮，永成主动支援。马来西亚医疗中心因投资者涉嫌洗黑钱被捕而功亏一篑，以珈在调查过程中，发现德桥早已知悉该投资者有问题，却对她有所隐瞒。明塱允许大部份已离职的医护回巢，但带头跳槽的英杰、建邦、宇泽等人遭一妍解雇；建邦主动向启澄求和……医疗城动土仪式举行后，天秤突然倒下，永成因此受重伤，急需换肾

programme.title: 荣誉:她们的法庭
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】三位律师挚友在专为女性受害者辩护的律所中，面对20年前秘密重现。她们展现钢铁般的团结，直面过去阴影，守护正义与彼此。

programme.title: 法官大人
programme.desc: 判昊试图让浩英回忆起能证明他肇事逃逸的线索。相赫决心找到凶手，但康宪命令他返回美国。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money

programme.title: Ep 3 London Stock Exchange's Julia Hoggett
programme.desc: The CEO of the London Stock Exchange reflects on why she didn’t want to follow in the footsteps of her renowned lawyer parents, her decision to come out as gay while a young banker in the City, and the bold steps she’s taking to modernize the LSE.

programme.title: Ep 47 Cnbc On Assignment In Evian-les-bains
programme.desc: CNBC travels to Evian-Les-Bains to visit the operational hub of Danone’s most famous water brand. We sit down exclusively with Danone’s CEO, Antoine de Saint-Affrique to learn more about the company’s ‘health through food’ strategy, and take you up the French Alps to explore Evian’s heritage, premium positioning and role within the group.

programme.title: Ep 2 Capital Convictions In An Unsettled World
programme.desc: Capital Group CEO Mike Gitlin examines how geopolitical shocks, shifting trade rules and market volatility are reshaping investment strategy. He shares where capital is moving now and how investors may need to reposition for a more uncertain world.

programme.title: Ep 977 Dfi
programme.desc: CNBC’s longest running feature show. For over 20 years Christine Tan has been talking to people who are shaping, governing and leading the Asia-Pacific region in this multi-award award winning show.

programme.title: Ep 7 What's Driving Growth: Ireland's Pharma Bet And India's Wealth Shift
programme.desc: The show that explains the why behind the headlines. This edition explores how Ireland became a global pharmaceutical powerhouse - and the risks of becoming too dependent on a handful of multinational companies. It also examines why India’s wealth is shifting from traditional assets such as gold and property into startups, as a new generation of investors reshapes the country’s capital landscape.

programme.title: 烈探

programme.title: 青木劫
programme.desc: 民国初年，富甲一方的康氏惨遭灭门，唯一的目击证人-家中的幼女-在亲眼目睹全家被杀后离奇失踪。几十年间，位于青木巷的废弃康宅充斥着灵异惊悚的气氛。随着真相逐渐揭露，这个恐怖的疑团交织着复仇与死亡的动机。

programme.title: 大上海

programme.title: 灵幻先生
programme.desc: 江湖术士茅山明无法驱除复仇的怨灵，只得与他的鬼同伴一起逃脱。他们躲进一个村庄后，遇到了意图灭绝人类的邪恶女魔头。于是，茅山明与师父九叔携手合作，对抗这位威胁村民的魔头。他们能否战胜黑暗势力，赢得最终的胜利？

programme.title: 望夫成龙
programme.desc: 在乡间长大的情侣石金水和吴带娣青梅竹马，但娣父反对他们在一起，于是二人搬到市区共同生活。带娣为助金水找到一份推销员工作，暗中当舞小姐为其筹款。金水因工作勤奋，受上司赏识，加以提拔。虽然工作发展如意，但金水渐渐发觉自己与带娣的距离越来越远...

programme.title: 叱咤风云
programme.desc: 车王李一飞不甘于过气的事实，为了争一口气证明自己，导致同队女车手吕莉莉发生意外，他所属的车队因此陷入倒闭危机。直至一名毫无赛道经验的虚拟赛车冠军选手加入车队，他的真实赛车表现竟超出预料。三人能否一起为车队重夺曾经拥有的辉煌与光荣？

programme.title: 靓女差馆
programme.desc: 雷女警长率领的港岛东刑事侦缉组的组员全是女警，因此有「靓女差馆」之称。警员生啤和沙爹对各女警一见难忘，遂主动申请调职到靓女差馆，意图接近众女并展开追求。这时，靓女差馆收到炸弹恐吓，她们最后能化解危机吗？

programme.title: 火云邪神之修罗面具
programme.desc: 十八年前，邪恶的黑羽会潜入了老邪神西城勇的地盘，盗走了修罗面具，而利用修罗面具放出当时只是个婴儿的魔神。老邪神为了魔神日后不作恶收养了婴儿，教他好好做人，成为小邪神。小邪神最后控制了面具的力量成为老邪神的接班人，继续守护城市。

programme.title: 柠檬可乐
programme.desc: 就读女校高中的婷婷，因排演《罗密欧与茱丽叶》而与邻校男生Jackson戏假情真，爱情就在排练时萌芽。这是婷婷的初恋，但Jaskson却是一个变幻莫测的爱情玩家...

programme.title: 十万火急
programme.desc: 这是关于香港消防员的英勇救火故事。勇敢的消防员无惧冲天大火，肩负救灾扶危的重任，甚至舍身救人。但当消防员脱下制服后，是否仍同样勇敢地面对自身的难题呢？

programme.title: 冰封侠之时空行者
programme.desc: 《冰封侠：时空行者》承接前作，四位明朝锦衣卫在现代香港苏醒。为修正历史，贺英独自踏上了寻找「时空金球」的凶险旅程，却不知自己正一步步堕入精心布下的致命陷阱。

programme.title: 贼王之王
programme.desc: 两名私家侦探欲藉破一连环大劫案而声名大噪。岂料调查过程中竟一再被贼王使计愚弄，笑话连篇。及后更发现原来所有劫案均与日商宫本有关，到底谁才是真正的贼王之王？

programme.title: Australian Story (2026)
programme.desc: In 2026, Logie-award-winning documentary program Australian Story celebrates 30 years sharing compelling stories about real people that illuminate, entertain and inspire. The power of the personal. Presented by Leigh Sales.

programme.title: Lisa Millar
programme.desc: Journalist Lisa Millar is in the kitchen and together they make a beautiful salmon poke bowl, before exploring pumpkin spice flavours to change Lisa's mind on American "fall".
