programme.title: Armed To Party
programme.desc: A young man who came to the U.S. to fulfil his dreams is killed at a birthday party, and Tulsa police must cut through a web of lies to find the culprit.

programme.title: The Killer Hitchhiker
programme.desc: After a man and a woman are found shot, investigators struggle to find clues to catch the killer until a deputy locates the victim's car filled with guns, silencers, and a mysterious man behind the wheel.

programme.title: A Mother's Touch
programme.desc: When an otherwise healthy woman is admitted to the hospital with sudden organ failure, an anonymous tip leads authorities to investigate a pattern of deaths in her family and a shocking prime suspect.
A man sees strange things on the deadly Karak Highway. Next, souls of dead children are kept in an amulet. Later, two men are spooked at a suicide spot.
Actress Mandy Chen feels a spirit following her after acting as a murdered victim. Next, six flatmates are spooked. Later, a photographer captures a haunting image.

programme.title: Revenge For Grandma
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a gas station robbery has a strange culprit; a driver arrested for DUI finds new ways to add to his rap sheet. And more!

programme.title: Pay Me For My Name
programme.desc: A woman alerts police to a crime she's committing; a golf game leads one player to see red on the green; a man wants to get paid by police during a traffic stop; and more!

programme.title: Jim (Part A)
programme.desc: Jim has been a collector from a very young age but some of the tragedies in his life have compounded Jim's hoarding behavior.

programme.desc: When a woman reports a brutal assault, investigators discover shifting stories, divided loyalties, and a jealous love triangle with deadly consequences.

programme.title: Eva Hamby
programme.desc: Eva Hamby sits down for a polygraph test with a former FBI agent in an effort to clear her name. Hamby was convicted of second-degree murder for the stabbing death of her boyfriend.

programme.title: Adrift
programme.desc: After a storm hits Warwick Cove, RI, a boat dragging its anchor appears in the harbour with a decomposed corpse onboard. Pathologist Dr. Priya Banerjee must identify the John Doe and determine how he died.

programme.title: Monster In Bayou Pigeon
programme.desc: In 1991 Curtis "Cochise" Smith, 29, heads out for diapers in Plaquemine, Louisiana, and vanishes. Twenty-five years later, a body surfaces in the bayou, and Cochise's murder case reignites.

programme.title: Kelsey Smith
programme.desc: Kelsey's family knew something was amiss when their usually responsible and responsive daughter didn't respond to their texts while out running an errand.

programme.title: Kamryn Johnson
programme.desc: 9-year-old Kamryn Johnson is supposed to be at gymnastics class when her mother, Sheraton, receives a frantic phone call saying Kamryn is being held captive for ransom.
A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A defendant claims she's the wife of a prince; a church pastor gets sentenced for running an unlicensed funeral business; and more.
A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A defendant flips off a judge; a baby interrupts a hearing; a mom sounds off on one of the men responsible for her daughter's death; and more.

programme.title: Murder And Mayhem In Taipei
programme.desc: It's the biggest manhunt in Taiwan's history when three criminals rapes and murders a famous pop star's daughter, Pai Hsiao Yen, and go on to commit other crimes.

programme.title: In A Lonely Place
programme.desc: After New Orleans detectives find a woman's burnt body in her car's trunk, they discover that her desperate 911 call went unheeded.

programme.title: Killer Biker Or Self-Defense Shooter?
programme.desc: A violent argument between two men erupts at a busy grocery store. One is shot dead and the other faces a murder charge. With the whole incident caught on CCTV, who will the jury believe was the aggressor?

programme.title: Streets Of Pain
programme.desc: A visit to Mobile ends in tragedy when a violent chain reaction leads to the death of a teenage girl.

programme.title: My Sister's Keeper
programme.desc: Detective Maurice Stewart investigates the murder of a 15-year-old boy who was gunned down after walking his younger sister home.

programme.title: 综艺大热门
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黄路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 声生不息·家年华
programme.desc: 节目邀请了来自两岸三地不同年龄阶段的12位优秀歌手作为固定嘉宾，以大众熟悉的音乐作为演唱内容，并以两大团队的比拼作为竞演方式，进行主题竞演，以音乐的视角引领观众探寻百年来文化的脉络。

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 异乡风味录
programme.desc: 在麻辣山城，白俄罗斯厨师为复刻家乡"苏俄红汤"寻得本地红菜根。新疆家族带来正宗烤羊肉串与烤馕，用餐厅凝聚同乡，在异乡安家。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 综艺玩很大
programme.desc: 综艺天王吴宗宪与超人气主持KID林柏升联手合作，艺人分成两队挑战各式关卡，节目充满趣味性，更借外景地点的不同，带领观众深入了解各地风土民情。

programme.title: 恋战冲绳
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】逃离无爱婚姻的 Jenny 带着一笔巨款来到冲绳，却卷入通缉犯唐杰与警探罗宏达之间的复杂局面。罗宏达假意联手策划抢劫以捉拿唐杰，却意外牵动出一段危机四伏的爱情与对峙。

programme.title: 你好，星期六
programme.desc: 节目通过新奇多样的环节设置和兼具知识性、趣味性的创意内容，深度展现明星艺能。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 灼灼风流
programme.desc: 讲述了心存凌云之志、一心考取功名的女官慕灼华（景甜饰）与沙场沐血折戟、誓为同袍雪冤的战神刘衍（冯绍峰饰）彼此救赎、相知相爱，携手守家卫国的故事。

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 世界第一等:菲律宾
programme.desc: 《世界第一等：菲律宾》带领观众走进充满热情与色彩的菲律宾，探索当地独特的文化、美食与人文风情。从火山地貌到街头美食，从传统疗法到社区故事，节目以轻松幽默的方式呈现菲律宾多元又迷人的面貌。

programme.title: 世界第一等:菲律宾
programme.desc: 《世界第一等：菲律宾》带领观众走进充满热情与色彩的菲律宾，探索当地独特的文化、美食与人文风情。从火山地貌到街头美食，从传统疗法到社区故事，节目以轻松幽默的方式呈现菲律宾多元又迷人的面貌。

programme.title: 异乡风味录
programme.desc: 在麻辣山城，白俄罗斯厨师为复刻家乡"苏俄红汤"寻得本地红菜根。新疆家族带来正宗烤羊肉串与烤馕，用餐厅凝聚同乡，在异乡安家。

programme.title: 去湘当有味的地方
programme.desc: 汪涵作为大哥带领沈梦辰、吴泽林网罗全省美食，借此展现14个市州丰富多元的湘菜味道，透过美食背后的故事，展现湖南各地独特的乡情烟火气。

programme.title: 夜限照相馆
programme.desc: 剧情讲述只为逝者存在的鬼客专门照相馆的刻薄摄影师徐奇周（周元饰）和热血的律师韩春（权娜拉饰）与阴森森的夜客们来往于生死之间惊险又奇妙的故事。

programme.title: 异乡风味录
programme.desc: 离乡十七年的东北人，将锅包肉的酸甜与铁锅炖的浓香融入小店。贵州厨师为一口地道酸汤，坚持从老家运来野生毛辣果。日料师傅与河南小伙也在此找到各自的位置。

programme.title: 灼灼风流
programme.desc: 讲述了心存凌云之志、一心考取功名的女官慕灼华（景甜饰）与沙场沐血折戟、誓为同袍雪冤的战神刘衍（冯绍峰饰）彼此救赎、相知相爱，携手守家卫国的故事。

programme.title: 灼灼风流
programme.desc: 讲述了心存凌云之志、一心考取功名的女官慕灼华（景甜饰）与沙场沐血折戟、誓为同袍雪冤的战神刘衍（冯绍峰饰）彼此救赎、相知相爱，携手守家卫国的故事。

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 无限复活
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】李伯仁是澳门赌场的高手，梦想征战拉斯维加斯，却因女友离弃、朋友嘲笑而陷入困境。他冒险借钱赴赌城，手风虽顺却接连遭遇不测。一场车祸后，他在调查干探提娜面前揭开真相。命运因神秘红番回头石发生翻转，让他有机会重写人生。

programme.title: 综艺大热门
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黄路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 魔音女团
programme.desc: 《魔音女团》是一档TVB真人秀节目，讲述16位女艺人接受唱歌、跳舞和Rap的密集训练，并经过层层淘汰，争取组成全新女团出道的过程。

programme.title: 又见逍遥
programme.desc: 于经典游戏《仙剑奇侠传》改编，故事讲述胸怀大侠梦想的店小二李逍遥与女娲后人赵灵儿一同历经艰难险阻，致力于寻找灵珠，勇敢地承担起拯救世界的责任。

programme.title: 流行都市
programme.desc: 《流行都市》为观众介绍时令产品、健康养生、健体运动、护肤化妆、时尚服饰、婴幼儿护理、育儿知识、城中美食、饲养宠物等潮流资讯，内容包罗万有！

programme.title: 快乐长门人
programme.desc: 节目请来专业医生及中医，详细探讨长者要注意的疾病及都市病，提供预防及治疗的方法。营养师讲解饮食知识，从饮食中学习养生之道。

programme.title: 美食新闻报道
programme.desc: 香港汇聚环球美食，特色佳肴、贴地料理受到识饮识食之人的密切关注！黄婉曼、蔡雪莹、倪嘉雯、黄嘉雯、廖慧仪、伍倩彤等美食主播、主持，紧贴最新饮食情报与优惠，深入了解滋味背后的故事。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 香港早晨
programme.desc: 报道香港、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 美女厨房
programme.desc: 萧正楠、Bob和张振朗主持第三度开放的《美女厨房》。一众女艺人听完菜名及流程简介，便要动手煮出指定菜式，在烹调时更要保持神秘感，让男嘉宾猜猜她们是谁。

programme.title: 港生活．港享受
programme.desc: 香港人生活多姿多采，《港生活．港享受》既呈献高贵典雅的品味生活，也会带来贴地亲民的优质享受。节目结合多元化主题，每集探索不同范畴，并请来各行各业的精英分享成功之道。

programme.title: Hands Up
programme.desc: 儿童节目《Hands Up》鼓励小朋友勇于发问，表达自我，向目标进发！吉祥物「酱汁家族」成员跟一众主持演出短剧，陪伴大家度过愉快时光。另会带来多首儿歌，让孩子们边唱边学习生活知识。

programme.title: 迷网
programme.desc: 高级督察司徒忠隶属网络安全及科技罪案调查科。他与刚毕业的见习督察萧美婷一起联手破获各种网络诈骗案的同时，不知不觉中互生好感。

programme.title: 隐门
programme.desc: 庄子乔 和张心月 是儿时朋友，因彼此父亲犯下罪行，他们走上了截然不同的道路。数年后重逢又会带来什么样的发展？

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 还原神之食
programme.desc: 文学作品中的虚构菜式，大家可有推想过是甚么味道？主持请来星级厨师，从电视剧集、电玩游戏、卡通动画、文学名著中寻找创意灵感，发掘内里提到的一些特色美食，并透过名厨的巧手，将这些看似不真实的菜式「还原」。

programme.title: 魔法伽利略
programme.desc: 《魔法伽利略》学院校长甄泽权带领两位「美女助教」冯盈盈、何依婷，藉精彩魔术表演与嘉宾互动。黎诺懿、陈敏之、泳儿、江嘉敏、林盛斌、丁子朗、戴祖仪等一众「星级学生」，欣赏神奇演出的同时，也要细心分析，从魔术、科学「二选一」！

programme.title: 周六聊Teen谷
programme.desc: 踏入科技年代，青少年对新兴电子产品、网络流行媒体尤感兴趣，追上时代步伐，已成新世代指标！主持陈星妤、陈懿德、王菲用尽所能搜罗世界各地至潮、至新情报，上至世界盛事、医学百科、文艺与科技；下至日常生活、网络热搜，跟观众一一分享。

programme.title: 中年好声音4
programme.desc: 《中年好声音4》为35岁以上热爱歌唱的人士提供舞台，鼓励他们勇敢追梦。本季扩大全球招募，覆盖粤港澳大湾区、北美、新加坡、马来西亚、澳洲等地，吸引更多来自不同背景的中年参赛者以歌声讲述自己的故事。

programme.title: 一周星星
programme.desc: 访谈节目《一周星星》，每集邀请星级艺人、界别名人，与区永权、许文轩、王镇泉等娱乐主播，分享新近工作企划，谈论电影、电视、演唱会相关的特别话题，尤其是网民与圈中朋友关心热议的人和事！

programme.title: 还原神之食
programme.desc: 文学作品中的虚构菜式，大家可有推想过是甚么味道？主持请来星级厨师，从电视剧集、电玩游戏、卡通动画、文学名著中寻找创意灵感，发掘内里提到的一些特色美食，并透过名厨的巧手，将这些看似不真实的菜式「还原」。

programme.title: 教煮争霸
programme.desc: 当「鼎爷」李家鼎、「三姐」萧秀香刚柔相遇，意味着一场全新的厨房大战蓄势待发！每集由嘉宾为鼎爷与三姐出题，当中包括著名厨师、识食艺人等，务求让两人以相同食材或主题，烹调出各具风格的菜式，比试同时分享煮食心得。

programme.title: 周六聊Teen谷
programme.desc: 踏入科技年代，青少年对新兴电子产品、网络流行媒体尤感兴趣，追上时代步伐，已成新世代指标！主持陈星妤、陈懿德、王菲用尽所能搜罗世界各地至潮、至新情报，上至世界盛事、医学百科、文艺与科技；下至日常生活、网络热搜，跟观众一一分享。

programme.title: 六点半新闻报导
programme.desc: 翡翠台每日下午六点半，报导本地、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 新闻透视
programme.desc: 《新闻透视》，每周专题报道多段香港以至国际的瞩目新闻，聚焦港人最关心的民生话题，并邀请各界人士、学者、专家，一同深入探讨个中来龙去脉。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: AI时代，未来实习生
programme.desc: 节目以"AI时代"为背景，探讨AI如何改变未来职场，并让家长和孩子一起体验"未来实习生"的概念，提前认识不同职业在AI浪潮中的变化与新机遇。

programme.title: 唱钱
programme.desc: 挑战音域的极限、拍子的精准，全新互动音乐游戏节目《唱钱》由森美、Eric Kwok、李茵彤任主持，以专业音准分析系统考验参赛者。九宫格代表九个难度等级，参赛者每当连成一线「过三关」，可选择提款离场、继续挑战，甚至是最难的Monster关卡。

programme.title: J Music
programme.desc: 《J Music》致力打造高质音乐平台，一众歌手有展示音乐实力的机会之余，也可让乐迷更深入了解歌手的音乐故事。节目邀请「人气」歌手担任嘉宾，由嘉宾亲自挑选其喜欢的新旧作品，并即场演唱，分享喜爱曲目。

programme.title: 直播灵接触 & A.I.灵接触
programme.desc: 《直播灵接触》载誉归来，第二季继续由「鬼王」梁思浩带领主持拍档黄耀英、黄紫恩，以及小编黄滢仴、汤之欣，为观众带来更多惊吓与惊喜。每集锁定不同灵异主题，诚邀「重量级」嘉宾讲鬼故，揭开法科风俗与行业秘闻。

programme.title: 晚间新闻
programme.desc: 每晚报道香港、两岸、国际重要新闻以及体育消息，让你洞悉各地大事及体坛动向。

programme.title: 周六聊Teen谷
programme.desc: 踏入科技年代，青少年对新兴电子产品、网络流行媒体尤感兴趣，追上时代步伐，已成新世代指标！主持陈星妤、陈懿德、王菲用尽所能搜罗世界各地至潮、至新情报，上至世界盛事、医学百科、文艺与科技；下至日常生活、网络热搜，跟观众一一分享。

programme.title: Tiny Dancer / The Sleepy Sun
programme.desc: Dora shows the twins a music box with a baila folklorico dancer who comes to life! Bailarina's adelita boots run away, so we need to get them back. // The sun won't set because it can't fall asleep! Dora needs to find Pillow Cloud so Sol can set.

programme.title: Tres Leches Trouble / Wizzle Wozzle Woo
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Benny have to trek through the rainforest to deliver a big, delicate tres leches cake to Benny's abuela. // Dora and the Fiesta Trio investigate a loud, strange noise that caused them to lose their instruments.

programme.title: Clock and Dance / Barbapileup
programme.desc: The barbababies prepare a show for Barbamama's birthday. While Barbalala finishes up, they go to the carnival where Barbabeau gets stuck in an attraction. // Three separate stories telescope into a big final bouquet in the middle of the courtyard.

programme.title: Relay Tales / The Barbababies' World
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it. // The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: Greedyguts / Where is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: Barbabright Has a Secret / Super Duper Cool
programme.desc: Barbabright acts strangely. What is he hiding ? The Barbabbabies will do anything to find out. // The Barbapapa decide to save energy. But their efforts are undermined by Barbabright and Barbabelle who build a secret energy-consuming project.

programme.title: Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Popcorn Cafe / The Crew Fixes A Slippery Mess
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew switch to cleanup mode when construction on Cafe Carl's new popcorn restaurant pops out of control. // A soapy accident causes slippery mayhem all over Builder Cove. Can the pups clean it up in time for Mayor Greatway's big jump?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Drive-In Movie Theater / The Crew Finds A Rainbow Treasure
programme.desc: Mix and Motor's favorite TV star has a new movie playing in Builder Cove, if the pups can build place to watch it! // When Grandpa tells the pups about a secret buried treasure, they find out the key to finding this treasure is construction teamwork!

programme.title: Pups Save a Robosaurus / Pups Save a Film Festival
programme.desc: When a homemade Robotic Dino named Earl comes to life, the pups need to find him, stop him, and bring him home. // The pups are shooting their Film Festival entry until Daring Danny X cuts the action with his dangerous stunt.

programme.title: Pups Bear-ly Save Danny / Pups Save the Mayor's Tulips
programme.desc: Daring Danny X is at it again! This time he's stuck in a tree over a deep canyon and is pursued by hungry bears. // Mayor Humdinger sabotages Mayor Goodway's perfect petals for the tulip contest. Chase and Rocky to the rescue!

programme.title: Going With The Flow / The Decoder
programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside. // Barbibul has created a clever decoder capable of translating the cries of animals.

programme.title: Fun and Games / King Thistle is Not Well
programme.desc: Holly gets frustrated when Ben uses his elf skills to win games. Then Ben gets frustrated when Holly uses her magic to win the games. // King Thistle needs medicine. Nanny Plum, Holly and Ben collect the ingredients for a potion to make him better.

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine.

programme.title: Parents
programme.desc: The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: Boots
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Experience
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution. // Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant / The Crew Cooks Up A Community Soup
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build! // When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: Isa's Royal Garden Party / Sammy's Surprise
programme.desc: The Queen of Reptiles is visiting Isa, but the garden's a mess! Dora helps her get everything ready in time for La Reina's visit. / Dora meets Sammy the Sloth, who needs to get to Day Camp on time so he can show everyone a special surprise.

programme.title: Big Rig to the Rescue!
programme.desc: When three big deliveries are needed all over Axle City, there's only one monster machine with the power to haul it all: Big Rig Blaze! But even Big Rig Blaze may not be able to make all the deliveries in time.

programme.title: Birthday Party / Tick Tock Mr. Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile wants to be a good guest at Daisy's birthday party since he's never been to one before. // Rushing to get to a concert on time, Mr. Crocodile and Daisy misplace their tickets at Mom's Box and Ship Shop.

programme.title: The Barbapapa Tree / The Barbababies' birthday
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: Bada-Bam / The Barbamartians
programme.desc: Barbabright captured a melody from Mars. The Barbapapas build a rocket to go to the red planet. // While travelling to Mars, the Barbapapas meet a family of Barbamartians. They have no time to get acquainted when a giant plant attacks the village.

programme.title: Double Booked / Bogweed / Prizes
programme.desc: Tim tries to be at two parties at once. // Tim tries to find a bogweed free snack for Kai. // After losing again and again, Tia tries to win every party game.

programme.title: The Dragon Game
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, Crusher, and Pickle are magically transported into an enchanted board game called The Dragon Game! Now, the four friends must overcome the game's dragon-themed challenges to win!

programme.title: Monster Machines at the Movies
programme.desc: Grab your popcorn, 'cause it's time for a monster machine movie party! Join Blaze and his family as they watch three movies-a superhero movie, an astronaut movie, and a detective movie-to earn a special surprise reward!

programme.title: The Crew Builds An Indoor Skydiving Center / The Crew Builds A Roller Rink
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway and Mr. Ducky-Doo want to show their skydiving skills. But when wind gets in the way, the pups help them sky dive on the ground! // When Wheeler and Truffles the pig can't ice skate, the crew finds a construction solution with wheels!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Bowling Alley / The Crew Builds A Superbloom Path
programme.desc: Rubble & the pups find Grandpa Gravel's lucky bowling ball. Too bad Builder Cove doesn't have a bowling alley... until now! // When a sudden superbloom traps Motor, Lily, and Park Ranger Rose, the pups need a flower-friendly construction solution.

programme.title: Pups Save a Baby Caribou / Pups Save Luke and His Luke-Alike
programme.desc: When a baby caribou winds up speeding down a mountainside. It's up to the PAW Patrol to save the calf and reunite him with his family. / When Luke Stars gets blown away in a giant tumbleweed, Digi and Tal make a duplicate which dances out of control.

programme.title: Pups Save a Disappearing Flounder / Pups Save Little Grandpa and Mr. Alex
programme.desc: When Cap'n Turbot's ship disappears, the Paw Patrol must venture into the mysterious Adventure Bay Triangle to find the missing vessel. // When Alex and Mr. Porter swap roles, the pups must help track down the Mini-Patrol after they go missing.

programme.title: Rainforest Race / Bok Bok Birthday
programme.desc: Dora and Boots race their boxcar against Croc Racers in the Rainforest Race. / Dora and Boots secretly hand out Big Red Chicken's birthday invites to all their friends in time for his birthday party.

programme.title: Bye Bye Balloon
programme.desc: Dora rescues Boots and her friends from Benny's out-of-control balloon so they can all go to La Reina's castle party.

programme.title: Boots
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control.

programme.title: Moon Parrot
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot.

programme.title: Tailball
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: The Boat Pond
programme.desc: Peppa and her family and friends are playing at the pond with their toy boats. Everyone has a boat to play with except Rebecca Rabbit. Daddy Pig makes Rebecca a boat out of newspaper. Rebecca's paper boat is so nice; everyone wants one.

programme.title: Mr Scarecrow
programme.desc: The birds keep eating the seeds from Grandpa Pig's flower garden. Peppa and George make a scarecrow, which stops the birds from eating. But Peppa is worried that the birds are hungry, so Granny Pig gives the birdies a birdfeeder with their own seeds.

programme.title: The Time Capsule
programme.desc: Peppa and her school friends are making a time capsule. They each put one of their favourite things inside and bury it in the school garden. The children discover that their parents made a time capsule many years ago.

programme.title: Recycling
programme.desc: Peppa and George help Mummy Pig tidy up the breakfast things. Mummy Pig tells them that bottles go into a special green box to be recycled. Old newspapers go in a red box and tins go in a blue box. Peppa and George have fun filling the boxes.

programme.title: The Lost Egg / The Elf Games
programme.desc: Ben, Holly and Gaston the Ladybird find an egg. A chick hatches from the egg and the children must find the mummy bird. // Ben is in training for the Elf Games. Holly wants to join in but the rules state there is no flying or magic allowed.

programme.title: The Treasure Hunt / Going into the Wild
programme.desc: Mr. Strict's twins visit the barbababies. The barbababies organize a treasure hunt for the twins and enjoy the great outdoors. // The Barbapapas are off to a new adventure... in the garden. But living in nature is more complicated than they expected.

programme.title: The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: Safety Croc / Good Sport Croc
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: The Big Balloon Rescue
programme.desc: All of Axle City is enjoying the Balloon Fair - until Crusher and Pickle get stuck on a runaway hot-air balloon! Now it's up to Blaze and AJ to rescue their high-flying friends... before they crash into the Slime Volcano!

programme.title: Blazing Amazing Stories
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are babysitting for Baby Gherkin! When it's time for her nap, they tell her three epic bedtime stories about police, cowboys, and superheroes - all starring Blaze and his friends!

programme.title: The Crew Builds An Art Museum / The Crew Builds A Giant Alphorn
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the perfect place to show off River's ever-changing photography projects... Builder Cove's own art museum! // Farmer Zoe has a new goat on her farm! But when she can't find the singing goat, the pups team up with Park Ranger Rose.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Skyscraper
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are building their biggest construction project ever... a skyscraper! And a job that huge calls for brand-new, mega-sized construction vehicles! But when Speed Meister sees the pups' big trucks, he calls in help from his big brother.

programme.title: Pups Save a City Kitty / Pups Save a Cloud Surfer
programme.desc: Cali gets lost in the woods. // Daring Danny X's harness loosens while kite-surfing.

programme.title: Pups Save a White Wolf / Pups Save a Wrong Way Explorer
programme.desc: After a sudden snow storm, Everest cares for a wolf cub as they work together to help the PAW Patrol find them. // Famous wrong-way explorer, Travelling Travis accidentally takes Chickaletta to the North Pole where they run into some crocodiles?

programme.title: Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: Shooting Star / Ball / Balloon
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: Present / Movie / Vinny
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: A Pinata For Mami / Invisi-Swiper
programme.desc: Dora's family makes a pinata for Mami's birthday, but it flies away! They have to get it back safe before Mami arrives. / Swiper swipes an invisibility blanket! Now Invisi-Swiper is swiping everything, and it's up to Dora and Boots to stop him.

programme.title: Isa's Royal Garden Party / Sammy's Surprise
programme.desc: The Queen of Reptiles is visiting Isa, but the garden's a mess! Dora helps her get everything ready in time for La Reina's visit. / Dora meets Sammy the Sloth, who needs to get to Day Camp on time so he can show everyone a special surprise.

programme.title: Baby Alexander
programme.desc: Baby Alexander is too young to talk, until Peppa teaches him his first word.

programme.title: Grampy Rabbit's Lighthouse
programme.desc: Granddad Dog takes Peppa, George and Danny Dog to visit Grampy Rabbit's lighthouse.

programme.title: Miss Rabbit's Day Off
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit has hurt her ankle, so her sister and her friends offer to fill in for her at the ice cream stand, the supermarket - and everywhere else she works!

programme.title: The Secret Club
programme.desc: Suzy and Peppa start a Secret Agent Club - going on secret missions, and doing secret things. In secret. But soon everyone wants to join!

programme.title: Grampy Rabbit's Boatyard
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig needs help when his boat sinks, so Granddad Dog gives them all a lift to Grampy Rabbit's Boatyard so that the boat can be fixed.

programme.title: Shake, Rattle and Bang
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle gives the class a music lesson. There's lots of crashing and banging at first, but it's not long before the grown-ups visit and lay down some notes of their own.

programme.title: The Lost Egg / The Elf Games
programme.desc: Ben, Holly and Gaston the Ladybird find an egg. A chick hatches from the egg and the children must find the mummy bird. // Ben is in training for the Elf Games. Holly wants to join in but the rules state there is no flying or magic allowed.

programme.title: Pups Get Growing / Pups Save a Space Toy
programme.desc: Fertilizer causes Yumi's crops to sprout huge veggies, so Ryder and the Paw Patrol must corral the stampeding produce! // The Paw Patrol draws a message on Farmer Al's field to tell the space aliens the pups found their lost toy!

programme.title: Pups Save the Glasses
programme.desc: Cap'n Turbot loses his glasses and creates chaos in his path. It's up to the Paw Patrol to save him and his specs!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Pig Barn / The Crew Builds A Giant Runway
programme.desc: A new farmer in town asks Rubble & Crew to build a barn for her pig! But will it be done in time for the big Pig Party? // Motor's super special birthday present gets delayed when the pups realize Builder Cove's airport needs a bigger runway.

programme.title: The Crew Fixes The Observatory
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are ready to replace the broken telescope lens at the Observatory. Until it starts a fiery fiasco during delivery!

programme.title: Borrower Daisy / Can Do Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile and Daisy try to figure out which of her friends borrowed her game and didn't return it. // A perfect "Step-Mother's" day for Maggie all depends on Daisy and Mr. Crocodile finding a can opener.

programme.title: Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: Lucca
programme.desc: In a Top Chef first, the final five travel to one of the top culinary destinations in the world - Italy. First the chefs must make an apertivo for 30 locals from the town of Lucca that pairs perfectly with a Peroni beer. Then, they have the experience of a chef's lifetime, hunting the elusive white truffle which they must use in a dish for a Tuscan food festival.

programme.title: The Hot Date
programme.desc: Sergeant Hoagie is going to have a date.

programme.title: The Shopping Spree
programme.desc: Mung, Chowder, and Shnitzel go on a wild spending spree.

programme.title: The Party Cruise
programme.desc: Mung takes Chowder and Shnitzel on a fishing trip.

programme.title: Won-Ton Bombs
programme.desc: Mung's old cooking master tells of Mung's greatest cooking failure.

programme.title: The Big Hat Biddies
programme.desc: It's Truffles' big day to impress the members of the Big Hat Biddies.

programme.title: Westley Side Story
programme.desc: The Westley kids are challenged to a music competition.

programme.title: Am I Blue?
programme.desc: Philly Phil's latest invention turns the kids blue.

programme.title: Prank Yankers
programme.desc: Tamika's tries to impress two popular older girls.

programme.title: Hollywood On Set S1
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: The Beast Inside
programme.desc: Dr. Animo has made a scary transformation and found a way to release the very dangerous animal nature of humans, including Max's life-long friend!

programme.title: Tomorrow Today
programme.desc: Ben discovers Steam Smythe excavating a 'House of the Future' built by Max's childhood idol, in search of a powerful device that will allow him to create devastating weapons for his war on progress.

programme.title: Max To The Max
programme.desc: While Ben, Gwen and Max hike to a waterfall, the Bugg Brothers are back with a plan to duplicate Diamondhead, but their cloning ray gun fires on Max instead, multiplying him endlessly.

programme.title: Zombozo-Land
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max revisit their favourite amusement park, renovated and rebranded as AdrenaWORLD. Unfortunately, the new management is Zombozo and his trio of new henchmen!

programme.title: Don't Laze Me, Bro
programme.desc: Ben and his arch-enemy, Billy Billions, clash in a duel for supremacy at the world's largest Laser Tag Park, Laser Town when Billy inadvertently ignites a robot rebellion.

programme.title: Omni-Tricked
programme.desc: Ben's holiday to Portland is cut short when he discovers an 11th alien while battling a Dr. Animo Mega-Creature and damages his Omnitrix in a fight.

programme.title: Out To Launch
programme.desc: While on a visit to Cape Canaveral, the Tennyson Trio attends the inaugural launch of an experimental space plane. When Vilgax commandeers the ship, Ben must stop him from weaponising the shuttle.

programme.title: Can I Keep It?
programme.desc: After stumbling upon a cute cat-dog-rabbit creature hybrid, or 'Cadobbit', Ben ignores Grandpa Max's advice and sneaks the animal onto the Rustbucket, but is soon in over his head as it turns on him.

programme.title: Battle At Biggie Box
programme.desc: Ben and Billy Billions go head-to-head over a Sumo Slammer Set sold exclusively inside the world's largest shopping centre, only to find six-year-old Simon Sez has gotten to it first.

programme.title: Bon Voyage
programme.desc: Aboard the SS Pettigrew on its final voyage, Ben must battle seasickness as well as Steam Smythe, who looks to use his mechanical creatures to sink the steamship's modern replacement.

programme.title: The 11th Alien, Part 1
programme.desc: With new Omni-Enhancements in tow, Ben plans on saving a town from a sudden mudslide, but his heroics are short-lived once Vilgax appears to warn him about the Omnitrix's mysterious new alien.

programme.title: The 11th Alien, Part 2
programme.desc: After discovering that Vilgax has joined forces with the Weatherheads, Ben must not only overcome his doubts, but must also fully embrace his new powers if he is to beat his foes.

programme.title: Mayhem In Mascot
programme.desc: When their attempt to get a photo with every storefront mascot is foiled, Ben and Gwen sneak out to get a snap with a wooden bear totem known as 'Yawk' only to find all the mascots have come to life.

programme.title: Screamcatcher
programme.desc: When a cavity forces Ben to consult a dentist, his day gets worse when the mean magician Hex uses a dreamcatcher to bring Ben's fears to life and transports them both to a nightmarish dreamscape.

programme.title: Vote Zombozo
programme.desc: When the Rustbucket must have a tune-up in the same town as Zombozo's latest campaign trail stop, Ben discovers the clown is using his speeches to hypnotise and rob the town.

programme.title: Animorphosis
programme.desc: As the Tennysons dig up dinosaur fossils in the Badlands, Ben is unaware that Vilgax and Dr. Amino have teamed up to steal alien DNA from the Omnitrix. Vilgax then double-crosses his fellow villain.

programme.title: High Stress Express
programme.desc: During a live feed of the new transcontinental bullet train, La Grange enters the picture to outrace the train, but Ben joins in on the fun and will stop at nothing to come out on top!

programme.title: Creature Feature
programme.desc: After Max dozes off before a double feature, Ben and Gwen are left to save the drive-in on their own when evil magician Hex brings the film monster 'That' to life and unleashes it on the cinemagoers.

programme.title: Drone On
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen engage in a highly competitive paper airplane war, but when alien-tech drones bombard the Rustbucket, they must work together to foil the aerial attack and find out who's behind it.

programme.title: Safari Sa'bad
programme.desc: Ben takes a detour on a jungle cruise during a trip to Adrenaworld West and finds himself hunted by the evil Tim Buktu. Ben must outwit Tim Buktu if he wants to make it off the theme park ride alive.

programme.title: The Nature Of Things
programme.desc: The Tennyson trio uncovers Steam Smythe's steam-powered generator during a sightseeing trip at the Geyser Gulch National Park, and must shut it down before it overloads the power grid.

programme.title: Assault On Pancake Palace
programme.desc: When Gwen enters a pancake-eating contest at the world-famous Pancake Palace, Ben spots the Bugg Brothers and must stop them before they obtain an endless supply of what fuels their creations.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: Scooby and the gang face their biggest, most challenging mystery ever, a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: Tad, The Lost Explorer, And The Secret Of King Midas
programme.desc: Tad travels to Las Vegas to see his friend Sara's latest discovery - a papyrus who turns everything he touches into gold.

programme.title: Restaurant Wars
programme.desc: It's Restaurant Wars and this season Padma takes all the limitations off the table as the chefs can make as much food as they want and shop wherever they choose. The two winning chefs from last week's concept challenge are given 48 hours to pick their teams and make the restaurants they pitched come to life.

programme.title: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: The chefs head to the mountains, a few hours outside of Los Angeles to go to Summer Camp where they are challenged to an outdoor grilling Quickfire for Padma and "Top Chef" Kentucky winner Kelsey Barnard Clark. Before the sun rises, the chefs get to work on an upscale brunch buffet for 200 moms vacationing at the camp using a very limited stock pantry.

programme.title: Colossal Coliseum Kaiseki
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world's largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. "The Dean" David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: Half dog, half man, Dog Man is sworn to protect and serve...as long as he isn't distracted by squirrels.

programme.title: Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me
programme.desc: Dr. Evil returns from space just as British spy Austin Powers learns on his honeymoon that his wife, Vanessa is a fembot under Dr Evil's control.

programme.title: I Wish I Could Get Back At Emma
programme.desc: A wish seems to ask Ruby and the others to take revenge into their hands. Mina stands her ground and refuses. Will Ruby learn something from this?

programme.title: I Wish We'd Stayed Friends
programme.desc: In this wish from Emerald's deep past, Ruby must resolve a family feud and misunderstanding before it's too late. Meanwhile, the well is threatened.

programme.title: I Wish Things Could've Turned Out Differently
programme.desc: Ruby struggles both to save the well and grant the wish of an enemy of the community.

programme.title: I Wish I Could Find Her
programme.desc: Ruby helps a wisher find a very special someone.

programme.title: I Wish I Could Get Away
programme.desc: Ruby's latest wish looks like it may be granting itself!

programme.title: I Wish We Could Get Back Together
programme.desc: Ruby helps a musical wisher mend a broken relationship.

programme.title: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: Will strives to be fully independent from the Banks family after his fallout with Lou. Ashley celebrates her 13th birthday.

programme.title: Speaking Truth
programme.desc: Will alienates himself from the Bel-Air basketball team and finds appealing opportunities in love and basketball with the help of some new South LA friends.

programme.title: Compromised
programme.desc: When Ashley's favorite teacher is fired, Will goes to great lengths to help her out and leaves Carlton in an uncomfortable position.

programme.title: Life According To Sam
programme.desc: This documentary explores the world of Sam Berns and the relentless pursuit of a treatment by his parents to save their son from Progeria, a fatal genetic condition.

programme.title: The Three Little Pigs
programme.desc: Deli Porkchop is a retired singer who runs a camp for girl piglets who build their homes while keeping their eyes peeled for the big, bad Wolfgang.

programme.title: Ali Baba And The Forty Thieves
programme.desc: Ali Baba is a young Arabian girl who outsmarts the Great One and his forty thieves.

programme.title: Brain Grub
programme.desc: Mung thinks that Chowder is scatterbrained so he gives him a special type of food called Brain Grub, making him very smart.

programme.title: The Apprentice Games Part 1
programme.desc: The Apprentice Games have begun and Chowder feels he's not prepared until Mung gives him the ultimate thrice cream.

programme.title: The Apprentice Games Part 2

programme.desc: When Chowder breaks a part of a machine, Mung Daal sends him out to fetch a new one, but Chowder has trouble remembering what he has to get.

programme.title: The Meach Harvest
programme.desc: Mung has to make a dish that requires a fruit that he fears, so he sends Chowder and Shnitzel to get the fruit.

programme.title: Shnitzel Quits
programme.desc: When Shnitzel feels that he is not getting enough of what he deserves he quites and leaves all of them. Later Shnitzel finds an job at Endive's. But Mung tries to get Shnitzel back.

programme.title: Banned From The Stand
programme.desc: Gazpacho tries to convince Mung to prove that he is right, but Mung refuses, so he restricts everybody from his stand until it becomes a problem.

programme.title: Creme Puff Hands
programme.desc: Chowder's hand inflates from misdirections, and it becomes helpful to the city at first, but then it becomes dangerous to the city. It also becomes a liability.

programme.desc: Chowder and the gang must get syrup for a recipe.

programme.desc: Chowder resorts to drastic measures to save all his precious junk.

programme.title: The Flying Flinger Lingons
programme.desc: Chowder becomes obsessed with the idea of joining a bouncy group.

programme.desc: Gazpacho babysits Chowder.

programme.desc: Chowder hatches a plan to save Mung's dignity.

programme.desc: Dr. Evil returns from space just as British spy Austin Powers learns on his honeymoon that his wife, Vanessa is a fembot under Dr Evil's control.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world's largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. "The Dean" David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown.

programme.title: Colossal Coliseum Kaiseki
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision.

programme.title: Michael's Santa Monica
programme.desc: Tom makes his final decision from Last Chance Kitchen on who should return to the competition. Then the chefs take off in a Quickfire with Padma and Jonathan Waxman making a two-course Business-Class dish for an airline. For their final challenge in Los Angeles before jetting off to Italy for the finale, the chefs go to Michael's Santa Monica, where they meet Chef and Restaurateur Michael McCarty, the legendary pioneer of California Cuisine.

programme.title: Lucca
programme.desc: In a Top Chef first, the final five travel to one of the top culinary destinations in the world - Italy. First the chefs must make an apertivo for 30 locals from the town of Lucca that pairs perfectly with a Peroni beer. Then, they have the experience of a chef's lifetime, hunting the elusive white truffle which they must use in a dish for a Tuscan food festival.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: A Superman who's driven by compassion and an inherent belief in the goodness of humankind.

programme.title: Austin Powers In Goldmember
programme.desc: The groovy Mike Myers and shagadelic Beyonce Knowles fight crime seventies style!

programme.title: Big Robot On Campus
programme.desc: When all the Westley Kids but Philly Phil get invited to a popular kid's party Philly Phil becomes determined to figure out exactly what it is about popular kid behavior that he doesn't grasp. The data he compiles on the subject he then uses to build a robot he calls BROC (Big Robot on Campus) which he endows with all the sure-fire popularity attributes he can think of thus making it possible for Philly Phil to ride into popularity on BROC's coattails.

programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: 声生不息·家年华
programme.desc: 节目邀请了来自两岸三地不同年龄阶段的12位优秀歌手作为固定嘉宾，以大众熟悉的音乐作为演唱内容，并以两大团队的比拼作为竞演方式，进行主题竞演，以音乐的视角引领观众探寻百年来文化的脉络。

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 异乡风味录

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 饥饿游戏
programme.desc: 史上最饿劣的食竞节目! 节目首创以"饥饿"为实境主轴, 想要摆脱'饿'名, 就必须无'饿'不作, 让饥饿指数归零, 成为最后赢家!

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 拜托ATM
